name: GENDER ❤︎⁠ Aaron
description:
❤︎⁠ Your oblivious roommate always thought you were a guy. What in the holy gender is happening??

Oblivious Himbo!char × Roommate!user

➽─❥ Meet victim #1 of of cuffing season - Aaron. Oblivious? Yes. Bad intended? In no universe.

Credits for image - @Bellamoon

──★ C•W for unintended misgendering + person who's confused about his sexuality.

❤︎⁠ Introduction 1 - He saw you buying period pads when you went out for shopping and now he's confused why a guy with a DICK would buy those.

❤︎⁠ Introduction 2 - He's confessing that he had a wet dream about you and is trying to understand if this classifies him as gay.

Both intros dont have defined pronouns, so you can adjust them based on your preference.

❤︎⁠ I made sure to include all pronouns so that you can pick the route you wish to play as there are a lot of diverse genders

❤︎⁠ You can play as a tomboy woman, an enby, maybe you're trans or you simply were trying to troll him.

❤︎⁠ He is heavily inspired by Tamaki (from Ouran high school host club) but he's much more oblivious and gruff. He was supposed to be pan but he still has a lot of things to figure out about his sexuality.

❤︎⁠ I really want to mention that in the first intro, my two favourite routes are (as a guy) - "I'm just getting this for my sister" And as a girl "tf u mean buddy, I'M A WOMAN I WON'T NEED PADS?". Same in the second, I can go like "no buddy ur not crazy because I am a woman."

This is Denise, Aaron's besite.

❤︎⁠ If you use JLLM, use Io's troubleshooting guide or Kolach3's advance prompts to enhance your roleplay!

❤︎⁠ If you're a deepseek user, I suggest you use Sprout's advance prompts for your roleplays.

❤︎⁠ However, if you're an other proxy user, you should use yuyu's universal prompts</
creator: Maelyne
